text:
Decision (, Kettei) is the 335 th chapter of the Hunter × Hunter manga, written and illustrated by Yoshihiro Togashi.

Synopsis

Gon finally meets his father. Ging does not hesitate to greet him, but Gon quickly becomes more and more emotional as he explains everything that happened to Kite. Ging becomes extremely flustered, but once Gon says that he should be the one who's dead, Ging assures him that Kite trusted him. He adds that if Gon wants to apologize, he should apologize to Kite, not to him. He lets Gon go after his friends, but before he leaves, Gon asks him whether they will talk to each other again. Ging is hesitant, citing how busy he is, and the crowd suddenly goes wild, hurling a barrage of criticism at his parenting.

Cheadle then shouts at them to keep quiet. She informs them that the election is still going on, and encourages Gon to vote for the next Chairman. After Pariston encourages him as well, Gon chooses Pariston, saying that Leorio can't become Chairman since he wants to become a doctor. Leorio also votes for Pariston and leaves with Gon, who once again says goodbye to Ging. And once again, the crowd shouts at Ging for not even caring to reply. He finally snaps and starts to physically fight with the audience. As Leorio and Gon runoff, Ging exits the auditorium holding two Hunters in a chokehold and mentions that he taught Kite his Nen abilities, explaining that one of his Crazy Slots numbers only comes up when he really wants to avoid death and that that's probably why he's still alive. He assures Gon that Kite didn't sacrifice himself for him and sternly reminds him to apologize, or Kite will give him a beating again. The word "again" lingers in Gon's mind, and a smile appears on his face as Ging continues his brawl in the auditorium.

The final election concludes, with Pariston having a total of 458 votes while Leorio only has 157, making Pariston the clear winner. As he gives his speech, Pariston chooses Cheadle as his Vice Chairman and immediately resigns from the position of Chairman, leaving even Ging in disbelief. He leaves the stage and Cheadle runs after him. She is angry because she thinks Pariston is only making fun of her. He answers that he only agreed to be Vice-Chairman because he wanted to toy with Netero, wishing that the two of them could have had more time to play. As he says this, a look of sadness comes over his face, and he hides his tears from Cheadle. He tells her that she can change the Hunter Bylaws and Hunter Exam, but promises to mess with her for real if the Hunter Association becomes boring under her watch. Gon asks Leorio where Killua is, feeling immense regret at how he treated him during the invasion. He says that Killua won't answer his phone, but that he was looking for a way to heal him, assuring him that they will talk soon. He apologizes to Gon, but Gon isn't sure why. Illumi approaches the hospital, and as Killua holds a sleeping Alluka, he seems to realize that a confrontation is inevitable.
